verses.text: Thubul hoih khat tawh ka lungsim hong dimletin, kumpipa la ka phuah a, ka leii pen laitheipa' laikung tawh hong kibang hi
Mihingte lakah nangmah na hoihpen a, thugen na siam a, na kam khum zungzung hi. Tua ahih manin Pasian in nang thupha hong pia tawntung hi
Vanglian kumpipa aw, na minthan'na leh na liatna tawh na namsau kuah in
Thumanna a omna ding leh thuman a hu dingin na minliatna tawh gualzo-in hong pusuak in la, dipkuathuai hihnate na taklam khut nangmah kihilhsak in
Kumpipa' galte' lungtangah na thaltang hiamte lut a, mite na nuai-ah puk uh hi
Na kumpi tokhom siangtho kip tawntung hi. Na kumpi ciangkhut thumanna ciangkhut hi a
thuman deihin gitlohna na mudah hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian ahi, nangma Pasian in na khan'gualte tungah a kikhai to-in lungdamna sathau nang hong nilhzo a
na puantualpite myrrh paknamtui, aloes paknamtui, leh thalsing namtuite a nam hi. Saiha tawh kibawl innpite panin khausai lasaknate in nang hong lungdamsak a
kumpite' tanute, numei uliante lakah om a, na taklamah Ofir gam khamte tawh kizemin kumpinu a ding hi
Tanu aw, ngai dih in; ngaihsun in la, na bil hong ngat in. Na mite leh na behte mangngilh in
Na melhoihna hangin kumpipa in hong deih ding hi. Na topa ahih ciangin ama mai-ah kun in
Mi haupen ahi Taia mite in na manpha namkim letsong tawh nang hong maivil ding uh hi
Kumpi tanu a inndei sungah kham puantualpi tawh kizem a, mel tuamtuam a nei puantualpite silh a, mihon kigual deudaute lakah a kithuahpih nungakte leh amah a khate tawh kumpipa kiangah kipaipih hi
Kumpipa' inn-ah a tun' ciangun lungdamna leh nuamna tawh amaute kitumpih hi
Na pate' tangding na tapate hong hi ding a, nangmah in leitung khempeuhah amaute, ulian na suaksak ding hi
Keimah in khang tawntungin na min ka kiphawksak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin mite in nang hong phat den ding uh hi.
